body.title: Tool-call parser flat-key fallback + verbatim TWM trace for cross-turn fidelity
body.result: f0ad6dab — Bug 1: _extract_tool_call flat-key fallback (treats top-level JSON keys other than 'name' as kwargs when nested parameters/arguments/args absent). Bug 2: parallel verbatim TWM trace at ingestion (category='verbatim_source', full untruncated content, 1800s TTL, urgency 0.9) + _build_verbatim_block injected into thread context prefix as labeled section alongside truncated gist. Biomimetic framing per conversation: Fuzzy Trace Theory gist+verbatim as parallel tracks, attention routes to the category the operation needs. Infrastructure already supported this — twm_read(category=...) is first-class SQL filter. 5 new tests (4 parser shapes + 1 live cortex round-trip). 1971 tests pass, zero regressions. Scope: user input only. Igor's own reply verbatim deferred to T-verbatim-trace-for-igor-replies-revisit (not-before 2026-04-19).
body.description:
Two bugs surfaced from 2026-04-12 session when Akien asked Igor to read /home/akien/TheIgorsProject/akien/Readings/20260412.ClaudeBecameABiomimeticEngineer.txt.

BUG 1: Tool-call parser in main.py:1616 _extract_tool_call too strict. LLM emitted flat JSON {"name": "read_file", "path": "..."} with path as top-level sibling of name. Parser tried parameters/arguments/args keys only, defaulted to {}, dispatched read_file() with zero args. Fix: when none of the nested-arg keys exist, treat every top-level JSON key other than name as the kwargs. ~5 lines.

BUG 2: Cross-turn verbatim fidelity loss. On turn 1 Igor had the full user_input. On turn 2 Igor fetched prior exchanges via _thread_context_prefix (main.py:2042) which renders each user turn as user_turn[:200] — hard display truncation. Akien's message was ~270 chars; chop at 200 landed near '.../20', which was exactly what Igor reported seeing. Igor was NOT confabulating — he accurately reported the only version of the message his attention could access on turn 2.

BIOMIMETIC FRAMING (from conversation with Akien):

Don't raise the truncation limit and don't extract key-facts into a sidecar. Fuzzy Trace Theory: humans encode every perception as BOTH a gist trace (compressed, narrative-optimized) AND a verbatim trace (full fidelity, available for precise dereference). Separate parallel tracks, not one lossy version with a handle. Attention routes to verbatim when the operation needs fidelity.

Implementation: seed a parallel verbatim TWM trace at user-input ingestion at category='verbatim_source', full untruncated content, TTL aligned to thread buffer lifetime. Gist stays in narrative-compression category unchanged. Prompt builder includes recent verbatim_source entries intact in a labeled section alongside truncated gist history. Attention learns which category fits which operation — no pointers, no extraction prepass, no structured sidecar.

INFRASTRUCTURE CONFIRMED: cortex.py:3656 twm_read(category=...) already supports first-class category-biased scans via SQL filter (line 3687-3689). No architectural change needed.

SCOPE (this ticket):
1. Tool-call parser flat-key fallback in _extract_tool_call (main.py:1616)
2. Verbatim TWM push at user-input ingestion — find the ingestion site, add twm_push(source='user_input_verbatim', content_csb=<full text>, salience=0.85, ttl_seconds=<thread_buffer_ttl>, category='verbatim_source', thread_id=...)
3. Prompt builder extension — wherever _thread_context_prefix feeds prior-turn context, also query twm_read(category='verbatim_source', thread_id=...) and inject as labeled section '[Recent user input, full text]: ...'

SCOPE BOUNDARY (will NOT do):
- No verbatim trace for Igor's OWN replies — separate revisit ticket gated to not-before 2026-04-19
- No fidelity-classifier, no key-fact extraction prepass, no blob pointers, no structured sidecar
- Won't touch narrative-compression truncation (stays at 200 — it's fine for its role)

TESTS:
- Tool-call parser accepts flat {'name': 'read_file', 'path': '...'} AND nested {'name': 'read_file', 'arguments': {'path': '...'}}
- User-input ingestion pushes a verbatim_source TWM observation with full untruncated content
- Prompt builder includes verbatim_source entries when thread_id matches
- End-to-end regression: simulate the exact failing turn 2 scenario, assert full path is in Igor's reasoning context

INERTIA: MEDIUM across all three sites. main.py extractor + ingestion site + prompt builder. No brainstem/, no models.py, no reasoners/base.py.

FORENSIC LOGGING: log every verbatim_source push (turn, thread, content length) and every verbatim_source retrieval for prompt building (thread, count retrieved) to logs/verbatim_trace.log.
